rule.APPROVE: median R >= 2 AND the seed-20261314 stability leg reproduces the same ruling (own median >= 2, own validity conjunct passing)
NULL_axes: settlement failure via the validity conjunct
load-sensitivity flip (reporting-only, names the axis, cannot flip the decision)
rule.cohort: arrivals with arrival tick in [2000, 20000), then drain to empty; run INVALID iff non-empty at absolute tick 80000 or POOLED cohort mean exactly 0
rule.evaluation_order: REJECT FIRST, then APPROVE, else NULL
rule.metric: median over the valid main-leg runs of the per-run cohort mean-wait ratio R = W(SPLIT_RANDOM)/W(POOLED), exact Fractions; median of an even count = mean of the two middle order statistics
rule.validity_conjunct: fewer than 1/4 of the leg's runs invalid (both bands carry it; a failed conjunct falls through to NULL settlement-failure)
